case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS LLC VS. DESEAN DEAMS et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DEAMS, DESEAN DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-20-2015
